name: Steak Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour and red pepper flakes in a shallow dish.
2. Mix well to ensure even coating.
3. Soak onions in milk for 15 minutes.
4. Drain the soaked onions and discard the milk.
5. Dust the onion slices with the flour and red pepper mixture.
6. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy-based frying pan to 175°C (350°F).
7. Fry onion slices until golden brown and crisp, about 3-4 minutes per side.
8. Season steaks as desired.
9. Place the cooked steaks on warmed sub rolls.
10. Top with fried onions and serve immediately.
